Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2016 Continued To Nov-09-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Leave To Amend Compliant, Answer Defendants Affirmative Defense; 1-33
Off Calendar Aug-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Linda Sue Catron (415-999-1933) Plaintiff/Moving party in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

Plaintiff did not comply with the tentative ruling rule. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LINDA CATRON Motion For Leave To Amend Compliant, Answer Defendants Affirmative Defense; 1-33 is DENIED. Motion fails to comply with CRC 3.1324. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and 1013. No proof of service re: all parties in this action.Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
